# AI Awareness Day

> National AI Awareness Day is on 4 June 2026 — a UK-wide campaign to build AI literacy in schools. Schools commit to one AI activity on the day. Free resources, live streams, and partner support for teachers, students, and parents.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/): Campaign overview, school registration, and countdown to 4 June 2026
- [Resources](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/resources/): Free classroom activities — lesson starters, assemblies, tutor time, and after-school sessions
- [Live schedule](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/schedule/): Live online sessions on 4 June 2026, filterable by key stage
- [Partners](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/partners/): Schools, charities, and organisations supporting the campaign
- [AI tools](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/ai-tools/): Curated AI tools for classroom use
- [From partners](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/from-partners/): Handpicked games and learning tools from trusted organisations

## Campaign updates

- [Campaign updates archive](https://aiawarenessday.co.uk/timeline/): News, milestones, partner announcements, and countdown updates for AI Awareness Day 2026
